'''Naithol''' was a male [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] executive of [[Seinar Corporation]]. He was in a meeting with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] about the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'', where he also disputed Irek's relationship with [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Drost Elegin]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
